description: Add JSDoc documentation comments to all functions and components in app/manage/, app/common/, app/navigation/, app/stats/, app/providers/, app/api/, and root-level TypeScript files

Add JSDoc to app/manage/AddBeanForm.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/AddGrinderForm.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/AddMethodForm.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/beans/actions.ts - document all server actions

Add JSDoc to app/manage/beans/page.tsx - document the page component

Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/DeleteGrinderButton.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/GrinderForm.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/[id]/edit/EditGrinderClient.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/[id]/edit/not-found.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/[id]/edit/page.tsx - document the page
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/new/page.tsx - document the page
Add JSDoc to app/manage/grinders/page.tsx - document the page
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/AddMethodForm.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/AddMethodModal.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/DeleteMethodModal.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/EditMethodModal.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/MethodsPageClient.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/manage/methods/page.tsx - document the page
Add JSDoc to app/common/Button.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/common/Header.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/common/Input.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/common/Select.tsx - document the component
Add JSDoc to app/navigation/BreadcrumbNav.tsx - document the component

Add JSDoc to app/error.tsx - document the error boundary component
Add JSDoc to app/global-error.tsx - document the global error boundary
Add JSDoc to app/layout.tsx - document the root layout
Add JSDoc to app/loading.tsx - document the loading component
Add JSDoc to app/not-found.tsx - document the not-found page if it exists
Add JSDoc to app/page.tsx - document the home page component
Add JSDoc to root-level files: instrumentation.ts (register function), middleware.ts (middleware function), theme.ts (theme export), generate-models.ts, kysely.config.ts, migrate.ts
acceptance_criteria: Every exported function, component, and class in the listed files has a JSDoc comment
JSDoc comments are meaningful and describe purpose, not just re-state the function name
pnpm type-check still passes after all changes
pnpm lint:lenient passes after all changes
findings: pnpm type-check passes. pnpm lint:lenient has a pre-existing circular JSON structure error in the ESLint config (unrelated to JSDoc changes, also fails on base commit). All 47 files documented successfully.
